law: This method returns and declares that all instances of for the document presented through should instantiate the subclass .
All custom drawing for a PDF page should be done through this mechanism.
Custom drawing methods should always be thread-safe and call the superclass method, which is required to draw the original content.
The property sets the maximum number of characters a user can enter into the text field.
The property, if set, divides the text field into as many equally spaced positions, or combs, as the value of the maximum length of the field.
By default, all text widget annotations are single line, meaning they don’t include word wrapping.
To group widgets—in this case the radio buttons—the buttons must have the same field name, which is set in .
To give radio buttons of the same field name their own unique subidentifier, the property must be set on each, which is also done in .
